name: io.github.livetennisapi/livetennisapi-mcp
description: Real-time tennis scores, players, odds and model win-probability for ATP, WTA, Challenger, ITF.

environmentVariables.name: LIVETENNISAPI_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Live Tennis API key (twjp_...). Get one free, no card, at https://livetennisapi.com/subscribe/free — the server runs without it but only the status check will work.
